name: Sample Resume 1
content:
Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience in full-stack development. Proficient in Python, Java, and JavaScript. Expert in microservices architecture, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps. Led teams of 5-10 engineers. Strong background in agile development and continuous integration/deployment.

Technical Skills:
- Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, Go, SQL
- Frameworks: Django, Spring Boot, React, FastAPI
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions

Experience:
- TechCorp Inc (2018-Present): Led development of microservices platform serving 10M+ users
- StartupXYZ (2016-2018): Built real-time analytics system handling 100K events/second
- DataSystems Corp (2015-2016): Implemented machine learning pipeline for recommendation engine

name: Sample Resume 2
content:
Product Manager with 6 years of experience in B2B SaaS. Proven track record of launching 5+ successful products. Strong data analytics and user research skills. Experienced in cross-functional collaboration and go-to-market strategies.

Core Competencies:
- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- User Research & Analytics
- Stakeholder Management
- Agile & Scrum
- Go-to-Market Strategy
- Data Analysis

Experience:
- CloudTech Solutions (2020-Present): Product Manager for Analytics Platform - grew ARR from $500K to $3M
- GrowthLabs (2018-2020): Senior Product Manager - managed 3-engineer team, launched 2 new products
- ConsultCorp (2017-2018): Associate Product Manager - supported product launches for enterprise clients

name: Sample Resume 3
content:
Data Scientist with 5 years of experience in machine learning and statistical analysis. Specializing in NLP, computer vision, and recommendation systems. Published 3 research papers in peer-reviewed journals.

Technical Stack:
- Programming: Python, R, SQL, Scala
- ML Frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost
- Big Data: Spark, Hadoop, Hive
- Visualization: Tableau, Matplotlib, Plotly
- Deployment: MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow

Key Projects:
- Built NLP model for document classification achieving 96% accuracy
- Developed recommendation engine increasing user engagement by 35%
- Implemented computer vision system for automated quality control

name: Sample Resume 4
content:
DevOps Engineer with 7 years of experience in infrastructure automation and cloud deployment. Expert in Kubernetes, containerization, and CI/CD pipelines. Improved system uptime from 99.5% to 99.99% through infrastructure optimization.

Core Expertise:
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible
- Container Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker Swarm
- CI/CD: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud

Accomplishments:
- Automated deployment pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
- Designed and implemented disaster recovery plan with RTO of 1 hour
- Mentored 3 junior engineers on Kubernetes best practices

name: Sample Resume 5
content:
Frontend Engineer with 4 years of experience building responsive web applications. Expertise in modern JavaScript frameworks and CSS. Focus on performance optimization and user experience.

Technologies:
- JavaScript Frameworks: React, Vue.js, Angular
- Styling: CSS3, SASS, Tailwind CSS, Material-UI
- Build Tools: Webpack, Vite, Parcel
- Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress
- Performance: Web Vitals optimization, Code splitting

Projects:
- Redesigned company dashboard reducing load time by 60%
- Implemented component library used across 10+ applications
- Led performance optimization initiative improving accessibility score to 98

name: Sample Resume 6
content:
Machine Learning Engineer with 6 years of experience building production-grade AI systems. Strong background in model deployment, feature engineering, and MLOps. Experienced in collaborating with product and platform teams to deliver measurable business impact.

Technical Skills:
- Languages: Python, SQL, Java
- ML: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, LightGBM
- MLOps: MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow, Docker
- Data Platforms: Spark, BigQuery, Snowflake
- APIs: FastAPI, gRPC

Experience:
- VisionLab AI (2021-Present): Built anomaly detection models reducing fraud losses by 22%
- SmartRetail (2018-2021): Deployed recommendation service improving conversion by 18%
- QuantData (2017-2018): Developed feature pipelines for weekly retraining workflows

name: Sample Resume 7
content:
Mobile Engineer with 5 years of experience developing iOS and Android applications at scale. Focused on app architecture, offline-first experiences, and performance tuning. Passionate about delivering accessible and intuitive mobile products.

Core Skills:
- Languages: Kotlin, Swift, Dart
- Frameworks: Android SDK, iOS UIKit, Flutter
- Architecture: MVVM, Clean Architecture
- Tooling: Firebase, Crashlytics, Fastlane
- Testing: XCTest, Espresso, Widget tests

Highlights:
- Launched fintech app used by 2M monthly users
- Improved startup performance by 40% through app modularization
- Introduced release automation reducing deployment errors by 70%

name: Sample Resume 8
content:
QA Automation Engineer with 7 years of experience in quality engineering for web and backend systems. Specialized in automation strategy, flaky test reduction, and CI test acceleration. Works closely with development teams to shift quality left.

Expertise:
- Automation: Playwright, Selenium, Cypress, Pytest
- API Testing: Postman, REST Assured
- CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions
- Performance: k6, JMeter
- Quality Practices: Test pyramid, contract testing

Achievements:
- Increased automation coverage from 35% to 82% in one year
- Reduced flaky tests by 60% via isolation and retry strategy redesign
- Built quality dashboards that cut regression triage time in half

name: Sample Resume 9
content:
Security Engineer with 8 years of experience in application security and cloud security architecture. Skilled in threat modeling, vulnerability management, and secure SDLC practices. Drives security adoption through engineering enablement and tooling.

Security Stack:
- AppSec: SAST, DAST, dependency scanning
- Cloud Security: IAM hardening, network segmentation, KMS
- Standards: OWASP ASVS, ISO 27001, SOC 2
- Tooling: Burp Suite, Trivy, Semgrep
- Languages: Python, Bash

Impact:
- Implemented security gates reducing critical vulnerabilities in release builds by 75%
- Led incident response tabletop program across 4 product teams
- Established secure coding training completed by 120+ engineers

name: Sample Resume 10
content:
Data Engineer with 6 years of experience designing reliable batch and streaming data platforms. Strong in distributed systems, data modeling, and observability for data pipelines. Known for improving data freshness and platform stability.

Technical Skills:
- Data Processing: Spark, Flink, Kafka
- Warehousing: Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery
- Orchestration: Airflow, Dagster
- Infrastructure: Terraform, Kubernetes
- Languages: Python, SQL, Scala

Projects:
- Built CDC pipeline reducing analytics latency from 24 hours to 20 minutes
- Implemented schema governance reducing data contract incidents by 45%
- Migrated legacy ETL to streaming architecture for near real-time reporting
